file.string: CBT Exam Browser is a specialized web browser for Computer Based Tests (CBT), designed to maintain honesty and security during online examinations. This application is developed to support exam systems in schools, universities, and other educational institutions.
1. Secure Exam Mode — Prevents access to other apps, screenshots, and multitasking features.
2. Custom School Domain — Each institution can use its own exam link.
3. Configuration File (.cbt) — Exam settings can be automatically loaded from a configuration file.

By submitting this form, you agree to send your personal information to BIGO Ads and {company_name}. BIGO Ads and {company_name} will use this information in accordance with their own privacy policy. View BIGO’s Privacy Policy and {company_name}’s Privacy Policy.

%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Looks like this app doesn\'t have location services configured. Please see OneSignal docs for more information.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off

Placement is not bidding type, please check placement bidding type
Please check the country of the IP of the ad requesting device in service country
IP is empty or ua is empty
The sdk version used for the new insertion style is too low. Please upgrade to version 3550 and above
New ad slot exceeded daily request limit
Please update to version 2310 or later
We\'ll continue to improve our service.
You\'ve submitted feedback! Please don\'t submit again.

Network is unavailable, please try again later.

Playing this content will use %.2f MB of data
Must be filled in or disabled to continue
Exam URL must be filled in
We detected the screen was unpinned, Please re-pin the screen, if detected again, the exam will be closed!
Please use the latest version to open this qr code !
Network or Server Connection Having Problems?
Please connect to wifi or celluler network !
Please enable screen pinning by pressing the button below
Input url server to login exam
System detected that you left the application!
You cannot return until the penalty time is over.
1. First violation is 1 minute, and subsequent violations will incur a 5-minute penalty, increasing by 5 minutes for each subsequent violation
2. Use the exit button to avoid violations
3. This page will automatically disappear once the penalty time is over
Form and saved data have been successfully reset

Following up on the new Google Play rules regarding the error message received due to the Non Compliant SDK from Unity Ads SDK issue, we have temporarily removed the integration of ads using Unity Ads in the Multiple Ad Networks SDK for an indefinite period of time until this issue is resolved by the Official Unity Technologies Developer Team.

Please change your ad type in the admin panel or json remote configuration with another ad network such as AdMob, Start.io, AppLovin Max, AppLovin Discovery, IronSource or Audience Network Bidding.

Note that this prompt will only be shown in your development builds. Live apps will not be affected and Unity Ads will not shows
